title: Date automation for more than just days

posts.author: tiagarmonsway (Tia Garmonsway)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have annual deadlines for certain projects, also ones that last up to 3 years.

I require a simple automation of When Status changes to Something, set date to date + 2 years. Or even 24 months would work.

I’m having to use formula at the moment so we have a date visible, however no notifications/emails/calendar entries can be made from those dates.

The closest I can find is set date to today + some days.

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @tiagarmonsway

There is an app in the marketplace (see https://monday.com/marketplace/10000032) that set either a date or a timeline relative to the time of the event. The app presents itself as an automation so it can be combined with any other automation.

image1713×457 28.6 KB

posts.author: tiagarmonsway (Tia Garmonsway)
posts.cookedHtml:
This is definitely closer to what I’m looking for. Though I feel this should be something already integrated in the current monday.com UI.

Also 10 days isn’t long enough access for us unfortunately.

Thank you though.
